items.title: Xbox is now XBOX
items.description: Xbox just allcapsmaxxed: Meet XBOX. This isn't a joke; Microsoft appears to be actually rebranding Xbox to XBOX. items.title: YouTube is expanding its AI deepfake detection tool to all adult users
items.description: YouTube is expanding its AI likeness detection program to all users over the age of 18 - meaning just about anyone can have the platform hunt for potential deepfakes of themselves. items.title: Mixtape is a musical portrait of teenage life
items.description: Playing Mixtape is like playing a video game version of a high school movie. Kids banter about the meaning of life and the theme songs that would play when they walk in a room.
